messages.message:
Error: Cannot access variable before it is declared

`connect` is accessed before it is declared, which prevents the earlier access from updating when this value changes over time.

  30 |       wsRef.current = null
  31 |       if (code !== 1000 && retries.current < 4) {
> 32 |         retryTimer.current = setTimeout(connect, Math.min(1000 * 2 ** retries.current, 15000))
     |                                         ^^^^^^^ `connect` accessed before it is declared
  33 |         retries.current++
  34 |       }
  35 |     }

  14 |   const retries    = useRef(0)
  15 |
> 16 |   const connect = useCallback(() => {
     |   ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
> 17 |     if (!documentId || !token) return
     | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
> 18 |     dispatch(setWsStatus('connecting'))
     …
     | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
> 35 |     }
     | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
> 36 |   }, [documentId, token, dispatch])
     | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ `connect` is declared here
  37 |
  38 |   useEffect(() => {
  39 |     connect()
